title: Protocol 3 for Sample plate set up
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs aliquoting from 7 different tube racks (first 96 tubes) into a 96 well plate. It then aliquots from a 12-well reservoir into the deep well plate.
steps_raw: This protocol performs aliquoting from 7 different tube racks (first 96 tubes) into a 96 well plate. It then aliquots from a 12-well reservoir into the deep well plate.
Aliquot 200uL from the approximately 7 tube racks into 96 well plate
Aliquot 275uL from 15mL-12 section reservoir into the deep well plate change tips for each row.
